popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Margrave of Austria, 1070-1095.  Crusader, 1101; by 1078, he joined the party of Rudolph of Hasburg.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/AUSTRIA.htm#LeopoldIIIdied1136A as of 3/29/2016

zh.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich是Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich和Adelheid von Wettin的兒子，於1052年出生在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希圖利可洛斯特尼包格。他於1069年與Ida Markgräfin von Österreich在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 陳結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1095年10月12日在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希霍恩加斯 阿姆 坎普享年43歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 姆爾爾多福 阿姆 音加斯 阿姆 音。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich是Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich和Adelheid von Wettin的儿子，于1052年出生在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希圖利可洛斯特尼包格。他于1069年与Ida Markgräfin von Österreich在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 陳结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1095年10月12日在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希霍恩加斯 阿姆 坎普享年43岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 姆爾爾多福 阿姆 音加斯 阿姆 音。

nameMeanings.name: Leopold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from liut ‘people’ + bold ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered by association with Latin leo ‘lion’. A name of this origin may have been introduced into Britain by the Normans, but if so it did not survive long. It was reintroduced to Britain from the Continent towards the end of the 19th‐century in honour of Leopold , King of the Belgians ( 1790–1865 ) and uncle of Queen Victoria , to whom he was an influential adviser in her youth: she named one of her sons after him.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich was born in 1052, in Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Lower Austria, Austria as the son of Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich and Adelheid von Wettin. He married Ida Markgräfin von Österreich in 1069, in Cham, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died on 12 October 1095, in Gars am Kamp, Horn, Lower Austria, Austria, at the age of 43, and was buried in Gars am Inn, Mühldorf, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich est né en 1052, à Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Autriche, fils d’Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich et Adelheid von Wettin. Il a épousé Ida Markgräfin von Österreich en 1069, à Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1095, à Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Autriche, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Gars am Inn, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich wurde 1052 in Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Österreich, als Sohn von Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich und Adelheid von Wettin geboren. Er hat 1069 in Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Deutschland Ida Markgräfin von Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1095 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Österreich und wurde in Gars am Inn, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich è nato il nel 1052 nel Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Austria come figlio di Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich e Adelheid von Wettin. Lui sposato Ida Markgräfin von Österreich nel 1069, nel Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1095, nel Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Austria, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Gars am Inn, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreichは1052年にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチトゥルンクロステルネウブルグでErnst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von ÖsterreichとAdelheid von Wettinの息子として生まれた。1069年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス チャムでIda Markgräfin von Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1095年10月12日にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチホールンガーズ アム カンップで43歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ムuhルドルフ アム インガーズ アム インにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich(은)는 1052년 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치 툴 클로스터니우버그에서 Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich(와)과 Adelheid von Wettin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1069년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 챔에서 Ida Markgräfin von Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 10월 12일 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치 호른 가스 아 카프에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 uh도르프 아 이 가스 아 이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich nasceu em 1052, em Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Áustria filho de Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich e Adelheid von Wettin. Ele casou-se com Ida Markgräfin von Österreich em 1069, em Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1095, em Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Áustria, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Gars am Inn, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich родился в 1052 г. в местности клостирнеубург, туллн, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия. Его родителей звали Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich и Adelheid von Wettin. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida Markgräfin von Österreich в 1069 г. в местности ландкрис чам, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер 12 октября 1095 г. в местности гарс ам камп, хаурн, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности гарс ам инн, ландкрис мuхлдорф ам инн, беиирн, Германия.

es.Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Ös: Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Austria
es.lifeSummary: Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich nació en 1052, en Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Austria como hijo de Ernst 'der Tapfere' Markgraf von Österreich y Adelheid von Wettin. Se casó con Ida Markgräfin von Österreich en 1069, en Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1095, en Gars am Kamp, Horn, Niederösterreich, Austria, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Gars am Inn, Landkreis Mühldorf am Inn, Bayern, Alemania.
